items.scenario: You are a member of a campus cooking club that booked a demonstration kitchen for a guest chef night next Thursday. The venue just informed you that two of the stoves will be under maintenance that evening.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Whitlock. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the event your club has planned
Ask whether the maintenance can be rescheduled
Explain what the club will need if both stoves stay closed
items.subject: Stove maintenance during Thursday's guest chef night

items.scenario: You recently joined a neighborhood gardening group that meets at the community center on Sundays. The center has offered a free composting talk next month, but the proposed weekday afternoon overlaps with most members' work hours.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Underwood. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the weekday afternoon time is difficult for members
Ask whether the talk could move to a weekend
Mention how many members hope to attend
items.subject: Better timing for the composting talk

items.scenario: You volunteer at a local food bank that recently switched to an online sign-up system for shifts. Several long-time volunteers have been double-booked, and a few weekend slots now show as full when they are not.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Renfrew. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problems with the new sign-up system
Explain how the errors are affecting the volunteer team
Ask whether the weekend slots can be corrected
items.subject: Sign-up errors on the new volunteer system

items.scenario: You finished your first month as a part-time assistant at a campus radio station. Your manager mentioned a chance to host a short segment, but you have not received the training schedule that was promised.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Castellanos. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your manager for the chance to host a segment
Ask when the training schedule will be available
Explain how you would prepare once it arrives
items.subject: Training schedule for the hosting segment
